# radius Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-12

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript 5.4 (browser extension), Go 1.22+ (schema/graph construction), TypeSpec (API definitions) + Cytoscape.js (graph rendering), Chrome Extension Manifest V3 APIs, GitHub Contents API, tweetnacl (crypto), @anthropic-ai/sdk (AI features) (002-github-app-graph-viz)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.4 (browser extension), Go 1.22+ (schema/graph construction), TypeSpec (API definitions): Follow standard conventions
